briefdescription.para: exclusive controls that are enabled/disabled for the specific browser window type
exclusive controls that are enabled/disabled for the specific browser window type
return the name of the external panel depending on main window name

parameterdescription.para: mainWindow panel name

briefdescription.para: return the name of the WaveNote Display inside BSP
return the name of the bottom Panel

parameterdescription.para: mainWindow panel name

briefdescription.para: Inits controls of BrowserSettings side Panel.

parameterdescription.para: mainWindow panel name

briefdescription.para: UnHides BrowserSettings side Panel.

parameterdescription.para: mainWindow panel name

briefdescription.para: open bottom Panel

parameterdescription.para: mainWindow panel name

briefdescription.para: dynamic settings for bottom panel at initialization

parameterdescription.para: mainWindow panel name

briefdescription.para: Unsets all control properties that are set in BSP_DynamicSweepControls for DataBrowser type.

parameterdescription.para: mainWindow panel name

briefdescription.para: dynamic settings for panel initialization

parameterdescription.para: mainWindow panel name

briefdescription.para: Hook function for the Sweep Formula Notebook.
Unsets all control properties that are set in BSP_DynamicStartupSettings for DataBrowser type.

parameterdescription.para: mainWindow panel name

briefdescription.para: Get the channel selection wave.

parameterdescription.para: name of external panel or main window

briefdescription.para: get a FOLDER property from the specified panel

parameterdescription.para: name of external panel or main window
see the FOLDER constants in this file
[optional, defaults to true] abort on outdated window version

simplesect.para: DFR to specified folder. No check for invalid folders

briefdescription.para: set a FOLDER property at the specified panel

parameterdescription.para: name of external panel or main window
DataFolder Reference to the folder
see the FOLDER constants in this file

briefdescription.para: get the assigned DEVICE property from the main panel

parameterdescription.para: name of external panel or main window

briefdescription.para: set DEVICE property to the userdata of the main panel

parameterdescription.para: name of external panel or main window
bound device as string

briefdescription.para: get the MIES Browser Type

parameterdescription.para: name of external panel or main window

simplesect.para: D for DataBrowser or S for SweepBrowser

briefdescription.para: set DEVICE property to the userdata of the main panel

parameterdescription.para: name of external panel or main window
One of BROWSERTYPE_DATABROWSER or BROWSERTYPE_SWEEPBROWSER

briefdescription.para: wrapper function for external calls
wrapper function for external calls
wrapper function for external calls
wrapper function for external calls
check if the DEVICE property has a not nullstring property

parameterdescription.para: name of external panel or main window

simplesect.para: 1 if device is assigned and 0 otherwise. does not check if device is valid.

briefdescription.para: set the initial state of the enable/disable buttons

parameterdescription.para: name of external panel or main window

briefdescription.para: enable/disable the OVS buttons

parameterdescription.para: specify mainPanel or bsPanel with OVS controls

briefdescription.para: enable/disable the AR buttons

parameterdescription.para: specify mainPanel or bsPanel with OVS controls

briefdescription.para: enable/disable the SF buttons

parameterdescription.para: specify mainPanel or bsPanel with OVS controls

briefdescription.para: enable/disable a list of controls

parameterdescription.para: specify mainPanel or bsPanel with OVS controls
list of controls
1: enable; 0: disable

briefdescription.para: action for button in mainPanel

parameterdescription.para: main Panel window
set status of external Panel (opened: visible = 1)

briefdescription.para: panel close hook for side panel
enable/disable checkbox control for side panel
enable/disable checkbox control for side panel
enable/disable checkbox control for side panel
procedure for the open button of the side panel

memberdef.argsstring: (string win, string ctrl, variable firstSweepOrIndex, variable lastSweepOrIndex)
memberdef.name: BSP_UpdateSweepControls

briefdescription.para: update controls in scPanel and change to new sweep

parameterdescription.para: name of external panel or main window
name of the button that was pressed and is initiating the update
first available sweep(DB) or index(SB)
last available sweep(DB) or index(SB)

simplesect.para: the new sweep number in case of DB or the index for SB

briefdescription.para: check if the specified setting is activated

parameterdescription.para: name of external panel or main window
one of MIES_BSP_* constants like MIES_BSP_PA

briefdescription.para: Fill the SweepFormula help notebook with the contents of the stored file.
Return a sweep formula graph name unique for that sweepbrowser/databrowser.
Parse a control name for the "Channel Selection Panel" and return its channel type and number. The number will be NaN for the ALL control.
Set the channel selection dialog controls according to the channel selection wave.
Set the channel selection wave acccording to the channel selection controls.

memberdef.argsstring: (wave channelSel, wave ADCs, wave DACs, wave statusHS, wave numericalValues, variable sweepNo)
memberdef.name: BSP_RemoveDisabledChannels

briefdescription.para: Removes the disabled channels and headstages from ADCs, DACs and statusHS

detaileddescription.para: channelSel will be the result from BSP_FetchSelectedChannels() which is a copy of the permanent channel selection wave.

memberdef.argsstring: (string win, variable logbookType, variable logbookWaveType, variable sweepNumber=defaultValue, variable selectedExpDevice=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: BSP_GetLogbookWave

briefdescription.para: Generic getter for labnotebook waves.

parameterdescription.para: panel
one of LogbookTypes
one of LabnotebookWaveTypes
[optional] sweep number
[optional, defaults to off] return the labnotebook for the selected experiment/device combination

simplesect.para: returns the specified logbook wave or a null wave

briefdescription.para: Return the wave with the selected channels respecting the overlay sweeps headstage ignore list. The wave has the same layout as BSP_GetChannelSelectionWave.
Return the last and first sweep numbers.
Unsets all control properties that are set in DB_DynamicSettingsHistory.
BSP Panel for DB and AB (SweepBrowser) that combines different settings in a tabcontrol.
